chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 857 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 11-09-2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. On the last date of hearing i.e. 02.09.2025, Counsel for the petitioner sought time to seek instructions from his client. Today, neither petitioner nor his Counsel turned up to proceed with the matter. The deliberate absence on the part of Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
